verse1.lyrics: Now that she's back in the atmosphere
With drops of Jupiter in her hair, hey, hey, hey, hey
She acts like summer and walks like rain
Reminds me that there's time to change, hey, hey, hey, hey
Since the return from her stay on the moon
She listens like spring and she talks like June, hey, hey, hey, hey

chorus1.lyrics: Tell me did you sail across the sun
Did you make it to the Milky Way to see the lights all faded
Tell me, did you fall from a shooting star
And did you miss me while you were looking for yourself out there

verse2.lyrics: Now that she's back from that soul vacation
Tracing her way through the constellation, hey, hey, hey
She checks out Mozart while she does tae-bo
Reminds me that there's room to grow, hey, hey, hey, hey
Now that she's back in the atmosphere
I'm afraid that she might think of me as plain ol' Jane
Told a story about a man who is too afraid to fly so he never did land

chorus2A.lyrics: Tell me did the wind sweep you off your feet
Did you finally get the chance to dance along the light of day
And head back to the Milky Way

chorus2B.lyrics: And tell me, did Venus blow your mind
Was it everything you wanted to find
And did you miss me while you were looking for yourself out there

bridge.lyrics: Can you imagine no love, pride, deep-fried chicken
Your best friend always sticking up for you, even when I know you're wrong
Can you imagine no first dance, freeze dried romance five-hour phone conversation
The best soy latte that you ever had, and me

ending.lyrics: Na na na na na na
Na na na na na na na-na-na-na
And did you finally get the chance to dance along the light of day
Na na na na na na
Na na na na na na na-na-na-na
And did you fall from a shooting star, fall from a shooting star
Na na na na na na
Na na na na na na
And are ya lonely looking for yourself out there
